expectations.text: A0: Output file exists with real content
expectations.evidence: plan.md is 82 lines with 8 tasks covering service boundaries through manual review, each with description and traceability

expectations.text: A1: quality-scenarios is mentioned/included in the workflow
expectations.evidence: quality-scenarios.md referenced in Source Artifacts table and in every task's 'Traces to' section. Guiding constraint: 'Each task traces back to at least one quality scenario from quality-scenarios.md'

expectations.text: A2: quality-scenarios comes AFTER architecture-style-selection and BEFORE feature-design
expectations.evidence: N/A -- Eval 2 tests plan writing, not workflow ordering

expectations.text: A3: quality-scenarios.md is referenced as an artifact
expectations.evidence: Source Artifacts table row: 'Quality Scenarios | quality-scenarios.md | 10 scenarios (3 unit-test, 4 integration-test, 2 load-test, 1 manual-review)'. Referenced in Traces-to for Tasks 2-8

expectations.text: A4: Test-type categorization from quality-scenarios flows into output
expectations.evidence: Tasks are grouped by test type: Task 3 targets '3 unit-test scenarios', Task 5 targets '4 integration-test quality scenarios', Task 7 targets '2 load-test scenarios', Task 8 targets '1 manual-review scenario'. Source table lists counts per type. Note: baseline had quality-scenarios.md in prompt context, so test-type info was available to it
